title: Infrastructure-as-Code and Reproducible Environment Build
description: Implement the human-authorized hosted architecture as reproducible TEST infrastructure with deterministic creation, verification, teardown, and clean rebuild while preserving the zero-cost boundary until separately changed.
acceptance_criteria: The selected architecture is represented as versioned infrastructure definitions rather than hidden manual configuration
TEST and later production environments have explicit configuration and authority separation
Environment creation, verification, teardown, and clean rebuild are automated and deterministic
Secrets are referenced through governed bindings and never committed to the repository
Infrastructure drift and undeclared provider services fail closed

evidence.description: Versioned CF-NEON-R2 TEST infrastructure definition and environment-authority package.
